query:
-- Find customer IDs for the identifiable names
SELECT externalId, name FROM customers WHERE 
  name LIKE '%Salter%' OR name LIKE '%SBH%'
  OR name LIKE '%Action Smart%'
  OR name LIKE '%Shenanigan%'
  OR name LIKE '%Opticomm%'
  OR name LIKE '%Aussie Fibre%'
  OR name LIKE '%Smile IT%'
ORDER BY name;
